hero.headline: Syracuse septic problems? *We fix them right.*
hero.subheadline: Real techs with real trucks — no surprises, no excuses.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every septic job we handle
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to emergency repairs

services.title: Septic Pumping
services.description: Regular maintenance keeps your system running. We pump, inspect, and let you know what we find.

services.title: System Repairs
services.description: Broken pipes, failed pumps, clogged lines. We diagnose the problem and fix it permanently.

services.title: Tank Installation
services.description: New construction or replacement tanks. Proper excavation, installation, and final inspection.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: Backups and overflows don't wait. We respond fast when your system fails.

about.heading: Built for Syracuse septic work
about.body: We're the Syracuse team that shows up when septic systems fail. One call gets you real techs with the right equipment.

cta.heading: Ready to fix your septic system?
